reasons: Deliverable 1: schemas/skill_audit_report.schema.json exists with complete JSON Schema draft/2020-12 definition covering summary/results minimal contract
Deliverable 2: ui/app/src/pages/audit/SkillAuditPage.tsx implements validateAuditReport() function (lines 141-254) with comprehensive field validation
Constraint met: summary/results minimal contract covered - schema requires 14 summary fields and 19 result item fields with nested LayerScores/LayerStatusMap
Constraint met: Field missing displays readable error - formatValidationErrors() (lines 260-268) generates human-readable Chinese error messages with path and description
Constraint met: No silent failures - validation errors are caught, logged to console.error (line 657), and thrown as Error with formatted message (line 658)
Deny condition NOT triggered: Validation errors are explicitly thrown and displayed via error state (lines 729-737), not swallowed
Schema validation covers: root object type, summary/results required fields, gate_counts structure, layer_scores/layer_status nested validation, gate enum validation (PASS/WARN/FAIL)
Error display UI: Lines 729-737 render error state with icon and message, ensuring user sees validation failures
Real data conformity: finance_legal_top3_l5-static_2026-02-22.json conforms to schema structure (verified line-by-line match)
Auto_check dependency: T60 gate passed with npm run build success, T61 code changes are additive and TypeScript-compilable

function validateAuditReport(data: unknown): { valid: true; data: AuditReport } | { valid: false; errors: ValidationError[] }
function formatValidationErrors(errors: ValidationError[]): string { ... return `数据格式错误 (${errors.length} 项): ${details}${more}`; }
const validationResult = validateAuditReport(rawData); if (validationResult.valid) { setReport(validationResult.data); } else { ... throw new Error(errorMsg); }
